hero.headline: Smoothies That Make You Feel Alive
hero.subtitle: Hand-blended with real fruit, superfoods, and a whole lot of love. Fuel your day the tropical way.
featured.headline: Our Most-Loved Blends
featured.subtitle: These crowd-pleasers fly off the counter. Discover what everyone's buzzing about.
menu.headline: Find Your Perfect Blend
menu.heroSubtitle: Fresh-blended smoothies made with real ingredients. Pick your favorite or try something new.
about.headline: Born Under the Sun
about.description: Tropikala started with a simple idea: smoothies should taste like a vacation, not a compromise. We source the freshest tropical fruits, blend them with premium superfoods, and serve them with a smile. Every sip is a mini getaway.
about.highlight1: 100% real fruit — no artificial flavors or syrups
about.highlight4: Made fresh to order, every single time
benefits.headline: Good for You, Great for Your Taste Buds
benefits.fresh.title: Farm-Fresh Ingredients
benefits.fresh.description: We partner with local farms to source the ripest, most flavorful fruits and vegetables for every blend.
benefits.nutrition.title: Nutrition-Packed
benefits.nutrition.description: Every smoothie is designed with balanced macros — protein, fiber, and natural energy to fuel your day.
benefits.custom.title: Fully Customizable
benefits.custom.description: Add protein, swap milks, boost with adaptogens — make every smoothie uniquely yours.
benefits.fast.title: Ready in Minutes
benefits.fast.description: Order ahead and skip the line. Your smoothie is blended fresh and ready when you arrive.
testimonials.headline: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.maya.quote: The Tropical Sunrise is my morning ritual. It tastes like vacation and keeps me energized until lunch!
testimonials.jordan.quote: As a personal trainer, I need clean fuel. The PB Powerhouse has the perfect protein-to-flavor ratio.
testimonials.priya.quote: The Matcha Zen is the most beautiful smoothie I've ever had. The lavender honey is genius.
promotions.headline: More Smoothie, Less Spend
promotions.subtitle: We love rewarding our regulars. Check out our current offers and start saving today.
promotions.happyHour.name: Happy Hour
promotions.happyHour.description: All classic blends are 20% off every weekday from 2–4 PM. The perfect afternoon pick-me-up.
promotions.loyalty.name: Tropikala Rewards
promotions.loyalty.description: Earn 1 point per dollar spent. Hit 50 points and your next smoothie is on us!
promotions.seasonal.name: Seasonal Special
promotions.seasonal.description: Try our limited-edition Dragon Fruit Dream at a special introductory price this month only.
cta.headline: Ready to Blend?
cta.subtitle: Order online for pickup or delivery. Your tropical escape is just a few taps away.
footer.tagline: Taste the tropics in every sip.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Tropikala Smoothie Co. All rights reserved.
cart.title: Your Cart
cart.emptySubtitle: Looks like you haven't added any smoothies yet.
smoothie.category.regular.name: Classic Blends
smoothie.category.regular.description: Our signature fruit & veggie smoothies made fresh daily.
smoothie.category.specialty.name: Specialty Creations
smoothie.category.specialty.description: Premium blends with superfoods, adaptogens, and unique flavors.
smoothie.tropical-sunrise.name: Tropical Sunrise
smoothie.tropical-sunrise.description: A vibrant blend of mango, pineapple, and passion fruit with a hint of coconut cream. Pure tropical paradise in every sip.
smoothie.tropical-sunrise.ingredients: Mango, Pineapple, Passion Fruit, Coconut Cream, Orange Juice
smoothie.berry-bliss.name: Berry Bliss
smoothie.berry-bliss.description: A luscious mix of strawberries, blueberries, and raspberries blended with creamy Greek yogurt and a drizzle of honey.
smoothie.berry-bliss.ingredients: Strawberries, Blueberries, Raspberries, Greek Yogurt, Honey
smoothie.green-machine.name: Green Machine
smoothie.green-machine.description: Spinach, kale, banana, and green apple blended with fresh ginger and lemon for a refreshing nutrient boost.
smoothie.green-machine.ingredients: Spinach, Kale, Banana, Green Apple, Ginger, Lemon
smoothie.mango-tango.name: Mango Tango
smoothie.mango-tango.description: Sweet mangoes paired with tangy lime, creamy banana, and a splash of coconut water. A tropical dance of flavors.
smoothie.mango-tango.ingredients: Mango, Banana, Lime, Coconut Water, Agave
smoothie.strawberry-wave.name: Strawberry Wave
smoothie.strawberry-wave.description: Sun-ripened strawberries blended with vanilla almond milk and a touch of maple syrup. Simple, classic, irresistible.
smoothie.strawberry-wave.ingredients: Strawberries, Almond Milk, Vanilla, Maple Syrup, Chia Seeds
smoothie.citrus-burst.name: Citrus Burst
smoothie.citrus-burst.description: Oranges, grapefruit, and lemon blended with turmeric and a touch of cayenne for a zesty immunity kick.
smoothie.citrus-burst.ingredients: Orange, Grapefruit, Lemon, Turmeric, Cayenne, Honey
smoothie.acai-royale.name: Acai Royale
smoothie.acai-royale.description: Premium acai blended with dark berries, banana, and topped with granola crumble. A superfood bowl in a cup.
smoothie.acai-royale.ingredients: Acai, Mixed Berries, Banana, Granola, Almond Butter, Oat Milk
smoothie.matcha-zen.name: Matcha Zen
smoothie.matcha-zen.description: Ceremonial-grade matcha whisked with oat milk, vanilla, and a hint of lavender honey. Calm energy, elevated taste.
smoothie.matcha-zen.ingredients: Matcha, Oat Milk, Vanilla, Lavender Honey, Banana
smoothie.golden-glow.name: Golden Glow
smoothie.golden-glow.description: Turmeric, mango, and ginger blended with golden milk and black pepper for maximum absorption. Anti-inflammatory bliss.
smoothie.golden-glow.ingredients: Turmeric, Mango, Ginger, Coconut Milk, Black Pepper, Cinnamon
smoothie.dragon-fruit-dream.name: Dragon Fruit Dream
smoothie.dragon-fruit-dream.description: Pink dragon fruit blended with lychee, coconut cream, and rose water. An exotic, Instagram-worthy masterpiece.
smoothie.dragon-fruit-dream.ingredients: Dragon Fruit, Lychee, Coconut Cream, Rose Water, Lime
smoothie.peanut-butter-powerhouse.name: PB Powerhouse
smoothie.peanut-butter-powerhouse.descri: Creamy peanut butter, banana, cacao nibs, and plant protein blended with oat milk. The ultimate post-workout fuel.
smoothie.peanut-butter-powerhouse.ingred: Peanut Butter, Banana, Cacao Nibs, Plant Protein, Oat Milk, Honey
smoothie.charcoal-detox.name: Charcoal Detox
smoothie.charcoal-detox.description: Activated charcoal with coconut, pineapple, and lemon. A dramatic-looking cleanse with bright tropical flavor.
smoothie.charcoal-detox.ingredients: Activated Charcoal, Coconut Milk, Pineapple, Lemon, Agave
